name: @basics/desktop
description: Basichome cross-platform desktop shell (Electron) — wraps the cloud/web renderer with an overlay pill, tray, and global shortcut. Runs on macOS and Windows.

scripts.bundle:web: doppler run --project backend --config dev -- pnpm --filter @basics/web build

build.//icon: electron-builder auto-generates per-platform app icons (icns/ico) from build/icon.png (1024x1024). The runtime BrowserWindow icon also references build/icon.png.
build.//extraResources: Bundles the Lens capture daemon INSIDE the app (one download). Drop the per-platform compiled daemon (lens / lens.exe, built from the lens repo) into desktop/vendor/lens/ before building; it lands at resources/lens/ where lens-client.findLensBinary() looks first.
build.//web: Bundles the cloud/web renderer as a Next standalone build INSIDE the app (no hosted web). `bundle:web` (run by `dist`, with Doppler so public NEXT_PUBLIC_* inline) produces ../web/.next/standalone. The monorepo nests the entry at standalone/web/server.js with node_modules at the standalone root, so we FLATTEN: ship standalone/web -> resources/web, standalone/node_modules -> resources/web/node_modules, then .next/static + public alongside. Result: resources/web/{server.js, node_modules, .next/static, public} — where web-server.js resolveServerJsPath() expects them. NO service-role key or JWT secret is in this output (the renderer uses cloud/api with a per-user JWT).

extendInfo.NSScreenCaptureUsageDescription: Basics records your screen to capture and learn your routines.
extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Basics records narration while you demonstrate a routine.
extendInfo.NSCameraUsageDescription: Basics may capture video while you record a demonstration.
extendInfo.NSAppleEventsUsageDescription: Basics controls other apps to run the automations you start.
